item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode, treated the prior three onboarding changes as ordinary unrelated context, and provided a practical ordered rollout plan for adding the equipment pickup entry.
